_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Amrapali Silicon City
project.address: Plot No. GH-01A, Sector 76, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.description: Amrapali Silicon City is a massive ready-to-move-in residential township in Sector 76, Noida, successfully completed and managed under the supervision of the Supreme Court Court Receiver and NBCC.
project.long_description: Amrapali Silicon City is an iconic 33-acre residential township in Sector 76, Noida. Originally launched in 2014 by the Amrapali Group, the project was successfully completed, structurally reinforced, and delivered under the direct supervision of the Supreme Court appointed Court Receiver, with execution by public sector giant NBCC. The township features 28 towers rising G+16 floors, delivering a total of 3,030 spacious apartments amidst 75% open landscaped areas. The society is fully operational and inhabited by hundreds of families. Operating within the Supreme Court's custom judicial framework, flat registries are actively executed via the Court Receiver portal, bypassing legacy developer-authority dues deadlocks and providing buyers with a flawless, bank-clearable legal title.
marketing_claims: Delivered by PSU Giant NBCC with Structural Integrity Certificates
100% Legal Safety under Supreme Court Court Receiver Supervision
75% Open Area with Flower Gardens & Landscaped Lobbies
Iconic 33-acre Gated Township with Operational Clubhouse and Golf Course
Easy Walk to Sector 76 Metro Station
project.project_risk_flag: Court Receiver Managed: Originally built by distressed Amrapali Group. Completed by NBCC. Highly secure via Supreme Court portal.

builder.name: Amrapali Group (NBCC Completed)
builder.company_overview: The Amrapali Group was one of India's largest real estate conglomerates before entering a severe financial collapse and regulatory crackdown. In 2019, the Supreme Court of India cancelled its RERA registrations and land leases, appointing Shri R. Venkataramani as Court Receiver to manage all assets, and tasking the state-run NBCC India with executing the construction of all stalled developments. Today, the Amrapali brand represents a unique judicial wealth-preservation framework, where homebuyers' assets are completed by public-sector engineering giants and legally title-cleared through Supreme Court decrees.

whats_included: Vitrified tile flooring in living and dining zones
Wooden laminate floor tiling in master bedroom
High quality sanitary ware in bathrooms
Semi-modular kitchen setup with steel sink

unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with Utility
unit_types.description: Standard 3 BHK offering cross-ventilated bedrooms, private dining nook, double balconies, and optimized floor layout. Constructed with robust earthquake-resistant RCC frame.
whats_included: Laminated wooden flooring in master bedroom
Vitrified tiling in all other areas
Concealed wiring with multiple TV/Telephone points

assumptions: GST is 0% as the project has received its Completion Certificate and is fully occupied.
All payments must be deposited directly to the UCO Bank Supreme Court Court Receiver account.
Registries bypass developer-Noida Authority debt deadlocks.

payment_plan.notes: Payment executes directly to the Court Receiver's verified UCO Bank account.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Amrapali Silicon City offers premium, ready-to-move-in township living in Sector 76 with robust NBCC physical engineering and absolute Supreme Court legal registry protection.
why_buy: Absolute Title Safety: Fully clear registries executed via Court Receiver NOCs, bypass all developer-Authority land disputes.
NBCC Quality Construction: Structural completions and engineering reinforcement executed successfully by PSU giant NBCC.
Comprehensive Amenities: Massive 33-acre township featuring an active clubhouse, swimming pools, and standard golf facilities.
why_avoid: Historic Brand Default Suffix: Association with defaulted Amrapali name may keep high-alpha speculative buyers away.
Large Gated Density: 33-acre township structure has higher social density compared to standalone low-density private societies.
decision_profile.best_for: Value-conscious family end-users and long-term yield investors who prioritize absolute title safety and robust PSU construction over developer name prestige.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Short-term flipping investors or HNI buyers who prioritize developer brand prestige over high-quality sovereign delivery.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Silicon City represents an outstanding ready-to-move-in buying opportunity. Its legal protection by the Supreme Court bypasses the regional land dues blockages entirely.

persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by spacious upscale RTM units, NBCC construction completion safety, and absolute Supreme Court legal registry protections.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Amrapali Silicon City represents an outstanding ready-to-move-in township buy. It delivers high-rise township living, physical reinforcement by NBCC, and absolute Supreme Court title protection at competitive rates.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For end-users, it offers beautiful large configurations, unblocked city views, and operational club facilities without any delivery risk.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Steady capital preservation asset. Valuation levels are rising as mortgage clearance from major banks becomes seamless.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Perfect for families. Active sports facilities, beautifully maintained flower gardens, and nearby premium schools make daily life comfortable.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Highly requested by premium corporate tenants working in Noida's IT corridors, generating robust rental yields.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Premium design specifications finished reliably by NBCC, representing elegant high-rise layouts.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Legally secure. Free of developer land deadlocks, though historically delayed.
walk_away_conditions: Buyers demanding ultra-low density developments under 50 units/acre.
Budget below Rs 1.00 Cr seeking starter units.
negotiation_leverage: Use the default reputation of the historic developer name to negotiate from individual motivated sellers.
Verify all ledger accounts with the Court Receiver before committing to a final price.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Buy now. Premium inventories in ready-to-move high-rises are highly limited.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Completed and clean society managed by Court Receiver NOCs.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Spacious premium configurations up to 2410 sqft 4 BHK; taller vertical height with panoramic views.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Completely free of historic default branding; lower social density with active bipartite registrations.
competitors.verdict: Sethi wins on private builder brand and lower density; Amrapali wins on palatial room sizing and sovereign legal safety.
competitors.price_delta_note: Amrapali is roughly at par on a per-sqft basis but offers significantly larger configurations.
